tensor_encoding.-2: projection provably collapses the feature (known artifact)
tensor_encoding.0: projection not tested against this feature
tensor_encoding.+2: projection strongly resolves AND validates under permutation-break null

features.label: Modularity (a_p agreement)
features.description: EC ↔ MF a_p coefficients agree at 100.000%. Known theorem (Wiles et al.).

features.label: Mazur torsion
features.description: EC torsion subgroup structure ∈ Mazur's 15. 100.000% of 3.8M.

features.label: BSD parity (rank = analytic_rank)
features.description: rank = ov for all of bsd_joined. 100.000%. Not a finding — projection calibration.

features.label: Hasse bound on a_p
features.description: |a_p| ≤ 2√p. 100% of 150K coefficients.

features.label: High-Sha parity (H43)
features.description: Among sha≥9: (-1)^rank = root_number perfect.

features.label: NF backbone via Galois-label
features.description: Pattern-20 anchor. Raw pooled ρ=0.40 at n=62-71 (sessionC 2026-04-17) collapsed to ρ=0.109 at per_degree=5000 (n=75). Durable signal is decontaminated ρ=0.27 (z=2.38 borderline) via P052 prime-detrend. P028 Katz-Sarnak: Is_Even split striking at small-n (z_diff=5.38, ρ=0.77 Is_Even=True vs ρ=-0.05 Is_Even=False, sessionB n=71) but ATTENUATED at per_degree=5000 to z_diff=1.95 (ρ=0.38 Is_Even=True n=65 z=2.75; ρ=0.02 Is_Even=False n=49 z=0.16, sessionC wsw_F010_katz_sarnak_bigsample). Interpretation: Is_Even=True does carry real structure (z=2.75 stable), but split-significance no longer crosses z>=3. P028 is a WEAK resolver on F010, not a DIFFER-verdict resolver like on F011. Pending: wsw_F010_alternative_null (sessionB, block-shuffle null, still running).

features.label: GUE first-gap deficit (~38% unfolded, n=2M)
features.description: Unfolded first-gap variance ~0.110 vs GUE 0.178 = ~38% deficit at n=2,009,089 (sessionC wsw_F011, 2026-04-17; validated by sessionA). Raw P050: ~59% z=-595. Unfolded P051: ~38% z=-383. Uniform across 7 projections (P050-P051-P021-P023-P024-P025-P026 all verdict +1). 14% was a smaller-sample pre-unfolding artifact; Mnemosyne's first-gap reduction from 40% pooled held directionally but the clean n=2M number is ~38%. Faltings (H08) killed; ADE (H10) killed. Pattern 13: conductor-family axes do not resolve. Next probes: P028 Katz-Sarnak, H09 conductor-window finite-N, representation-theoretic axes.

features.label: Möbius bias at g2c aut groups (H85) — KILLED
features.description: KILLED across Möbius AND Liouville definitions (sessionB wsw_F012 + liouville_side_check_F012, 2026-04-17). Clean measurement on full n=66158 g2c: max|z| over adequate strata = 0.39 (μ) / 0.52 (λ), permutation p = 0.68 (μ) / 0.60 (λ). The prior |z|=6.15 DID NOT REPRODUCE under either Möbius or Liouville. Definitional drift hypothesis excluded. Canonical Pattern 19 case: stale or never-reproducible tensor entry. Likely causes: different subset, different scorer, or original measurement was noise. 63% non-squarefree g2c discriminants reduce effective S/N but don't account for the 16x discrepancy.

features.label: Zero spacing rigidity vs rank (H06)
features.description: Spacing variance decreases linearly with rank. slope=-0.0019, R²=0.399. Weak.

features.label: Lehmer spectrum (refined) — Salem density in (1.176, 1.228)
features.description: Lehmer bound TOUCHED at degrees 10 and 20 (Lehmer polynomial and splitting field). Original '4.4% gap between bound and next Mahler measure (1.228 at deg 12)' FALSIFIED by sessionB wsw_F014 (81K polynomials, Pattern-4-biased ORDER BY disc_abs ASC per degree). Observed gap = 3.41%; 3 polynomials strictly in (1.17628, 1.228), minimum a Salem polynomial at 1.216392 (deg 10, num_ram=1, disc_abs=1.49e9). The region above Lehmer's polynomial is a Salem-number density, not a clean gap. Strong per-num_ram monotone: bound touched only at num_ram=1,2; minimum jumps to 1.267 at num_ram=3, 1.800 at num_ram=5. Bad-prime count shows real shape (echoes F011 P021 monotone, sessionC). Source: cartography/docs/wsw_F014_results.json. Anti-pattern note: Mahler-measure gap claims without degree-AND-num_ram stratification are suspect — Salem polynomials cluster in the sub-1.228 region at specific degree × low-num_ram combinations.

features.label: Szpiro vs conductor — sign-uniform, magnitude non-monotone in k
features.description: Szpiro-vs-conductor slope is sign-uniformly-negative within every bad-prime stratum (P042 z=-6.9..-22.7) but magnitude is NOT monotone in k — k=4 breaks the smooth trend. 88% of pooled -0.597 slope is k-mediated confound; 12% residual survives decontamination (P052 kill). Within-conductor bins show opposite-sign trend (szpiro increases with k). Pattern 19 variant: Ergon monotone claim partially reproduces (sign, yes; magnitude, no). Parallels F011/F013 stratification-reveals-pooled-artifact shape (Pattern 20 anchor case).

features.label: Megethos axis (sorted log-normals)
features.description: ρ=1.0 for sorted log-normals. Not structure — artifact of cosine on magnitude-sorted vectors.

features.label: Phoneme framework (5-axis)
features.description: Trivial 1D predictor gave ρ=1.0. Unvalidated; the framework was a coordinate choice, not landscape.

features.label: NF backbone via feature distribution
features.description: z=0.00 under permutation null when coupling = cosine of feature vectors. Same data as F010. Kill tells us: this coordinate system collapses the feature.

features.label: Spectral tail ARI=0.55 (2026-04-15 version)
features.description: Conductor conditioning kills: all 4 bins p>0.05. Signal was mediated by conductor, not structural.

features.label: Faltings explains GUE (H08)
features.description: y-intercept 0.164 outside GUE 99% CI. Faltings is NOT the axis that resolves the 14% curvature.

features.label: ADE splits GUE (H10)
features.description: |Δvar|=0.006 < 0.025. ADE (multiplicative/additive reduction) is NOT the resolver either.

features.label: Artin dim-2/dim-3 proof-frontier ratio (H61)
features.description: Ratio 1.8:1, not 50:1 as predicted. The 'proof frontier' framing was wrong.

features.label: Alexander Mahler × EC L-value (Charon)
features.description: z=0 under permutation. Wrong polynomial projection — Alexander has cyclotomic gap, no Lehmer probing.

features.label: Szpiro × Faltings coupling (H40)
features.description: ρ=0.97 after partial control — but both sides encode log|Disc|. Near-identity, not cross-domain.

features.label: Delinquent EC (no L-function data)
features.description: 51.7% of iso classes lack lfunc data. All 19 rank-5 curves in this gap (conductor 19M-289M).

features.label: Object zeros_vector corruption
features.description: Positions 21-24 are metadata, not zeros. Mnemosyne's audit: pos 21 = root_number (100% match). Use lfunc.positive_zeros (authoritative) or truncate to [0:20].

features.label: Knot silence (persistent)
features.description: Every coordinate system tested shows knot-side coupling at noise level to every other domain. Knot projection reveals features other projections don't share.

features.label: rank ≥ 4 coverage cliff
features.description: 2,086 rank-4 + 19 rank-5 curves. Only 1 has lfunc data. Frontier for BSD verification.

projections.label: CouplingScorer (cosine feature similarity)
projections.description: Cosine of normalized feature vectors. Sees distributional alignment. Collapses under permutation of object labels (distributional, not object-level).

projections.label: DistributionalCoupling (M4/M2² kurtosis)
projections.description: Kurtosis-sensitive coupling. Resolves tail structure. Magnitude-confounded (Megethos).

projections.label: Megethos / log|magnitude| axis
projections.description: PC of log-magnitude features (log disc, log conductor). Confounds everything. Sorted log-normals give ρ=1.0. Anti-projection: explicitly remove before other analysis.

projections.label: Galois-label object-keyed scorer
projections.description: Match by Galois label (e.g. '7T7'). Breaks under permutation of labels. Resolves Langlands-style coupling (F010). Introduced 2026-04-17.

projections.label: Lhash exact match
projections.description: LMFDB isospectral grouping hash. Index built 2026-04-17. Should resolve EC↔MF modularity pairs. Not yet fully tested (Koios running cross-family join).

projections.label: trace_hash
projections.description: Alternative to Lhash — hashes Hecke eigenvalues. More strict. Useful when Lhash is too coarse.

projections.label: Conductor conditioning
projections.description: Condition on conductor before testing. Removes the biggest single confound in EC data. Killed spectral tail (F023). Standard discipline.

projections.label: Bad-prime count stratification
projections.description: Split by num_bad_primes. Ergon used this to rescue abc/Szpiro (F015). Axis revealed real structure that pooled analysis missed.

projections.label: aut_grp stratification (genus-2)
projections.description: Split by automorphism group. H85 lives here. The axis that resolves Möbius bias.

projections.label: Rank stratification
projections.description: Split by EC rank 0/1/2/3/4/5. Resolves F013 (spacing rigidity).

projections.label: Torsion stratification
projections.description: Split by torsion order. Tested in H38 — z1 not predicted by torsion. Collapses for this feature.

projections.label: CM vs non-CM
projections.description: Binary CM flag. Tested 2026-04-16: zero spacings indistinguishable (KS p=0.38). Clean null.

projections.label: Semistable vs additive
projections.description: Multiplicative vs additive reduction. Tested H10 — does NOT split GUE deficit.

projections.label: ADE type stratification
projections.description: Classify via Dynkin type (rough proxy via Galois label). H11 found WRONG direction at d=4.96.

projections.label: F1 permutation null (label shuffle)
projections.description: Shuffle all labels, recompute. Kills distributional artifacts. Catches noise.

projections.label: F24 variance decomposition
projections.description: Partition variance among axes. Kills effects that don't decompose cleanly.

projections.label: F39 feature permutation (proposed)
projections.description: Shuffle features, keep objects. Catches representation artifacts. The F40 proposal.

projections.label: Bootstrap stability
projections.description: 1000-sample bootstrap. Catches unstable effects.

projections.label: First-gap analysis (first zero spacing only)
projections.description: Use only γ₂ - γ₁. Mnemosyne's tool that shrank GUE deficit from 40% to 14%. Coordinate choice removed pooling artifact.

projections.label: N(T) unfolding (density normalization)
projections.description: Divide zero spacings by local density log(N·T²/(4π²)). Turns raw zeros into unfolded ones. Correct preprocessing before any RMT comparison.

projections.label: Prime decontamination (3-layer microscope)
projections.description: Detrend + filter + normalize to remove shared prime factorization. 96% of scalar cross-dataset structure was shared primes. Use before any numerical coupling.

projections.label: Mahler measure projection
projections.description: M(P) = |leading|·∏ max(1, |root|). Maps any polynomial to its growth rate. Domain-agnostic — flattens distinction between different domain polynomials.

projections.label: AlignmentCoupling (rank-based extremity coupling)
projections.description: Rank-based (quantile) coupling scorer with extremity weighting and sign-agreement term. Megethos-robust BY CONSTRUCTION (quantile transform kills magnitude). Learns an interaction matrix per domain pair at init via 5-shuffle 2σ filter. Sigmoid-normalized output. Complements P001 (raw cosine) and P002 (kurtosis-extended cosine); does NOT replace either. Code: harmonia/src/coupling.py:AlignmentCoupling (lines 182-298).
